summary.summary: This change syncs the release branch v0.8.4 back into the dev branch via a patch release titled "Patch Release v0.8.4 — Sync back to Dev" (see pr:gordolio/Trio#1258 and pr:nightscout/Trio#1258). It includes a merge of 'dev' into release/v0.8.4 (commit:a7eb9365ccd1) and the merge of the release PR (commit:98c2f0afea1c).
